messages.meta.name: TangMo
messages.index.title: About TangMo
messages.index.aboutMe.title: About TangMo
messages.index.aboutMe.imageCaption: TangMo often use the default “Anemo” dragon avatar in VRChat
messages.index.aboutMe.para: Hello! It’s TangMo from Thailand, living far from home. The name literally translates to “watermelon”. I’d be happy to chat about stuff from tech, photography, to daily dose of furry memes. I spend a lot of time on VRChat, usually as the default “Anemo” avatar (pictured). See ya around!
messages.index.aboutChara.title: About the character
messages.index.aboutChara.imageAlt: Bust shot painting of TangMo’s character
messages.index.aboutChara.para: Yet another blue wolf among 23,547 others in the fandom. He… exists…? I just put him in drawings sometimes.
messages.nav.title: TangMo
messages.contact.title: Talk to me!
messages.bookingApp.booking.title: Book My Body!
messages.bookingApp.booking.intro: Want to play with me? Perhaps in private? Request booking here!
messages.bookingApp.booking.form_info: What do you want to do to me uwu?
messages.bookingApp.booking.form_notice: Once you submit the form, I will review the request and send you quotation on Telegram.
messages.bookingApp.result.title: Err…
messages.bookingApp.result.content: You might have taken the joke too seriously. But if you are really bored, you feel free to come {link}.
